scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:go && prettier --check README.md config*.yaml internal/web/embed/index.html internal/web/embed/input.css internal/web/embed/app.ts
scripts.format:web: prettier --write README.md config*.yaml internal/web/embed/index.html internal/web/embed/input.css internal/web/embed/app.ts
scripts.format: npm run format:go && npm run format:web
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build
